name: 20% heat-inactivated human serum with menadione and hemin (PMC10949514)
description: 20% heat-inactivated human serum with menadione and hemin — medium reported in PMC10949514 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC10949514 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.formulation_warning: workflow correction sparse; kept original — Real defined medium used for Fig growth curves. Corrections: (1) O2 removed and oxygen changed facultative→anaerobic — P. gingivalis is a strict anaerobe, cultured anaerobically at 37°C per the paper; (2) hemin (5 µg/mL) and human serum, which were relegated to 'uncovered', are added as real components. The base (heat-inactivated human serum) is a complex/undefined biological base, so it is not a named standard medium and cannot be expanded to defined salts.
provenance.verification_evidence: Growth curves of P. gingivalis ATCC 33277 and Δpgn_1547 mutant growing in 20% heat-inactivated human serum supplemented with 1 µg/mL menadione and 5 µg/mL hemin ... P. gingivalis ATCC 33277 was cultured anaerobically at 37°C.

uncovered.name: heat-inactivated human serum
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

uncovered.name: hemin
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation
